description: Cycle 4 — FINAL cleanup cycle: Fix all 10 residual issues from Cycle 3 quality gates and run production readiness checks. Prompts 16-18 are independent (parallel), 19 depends on 16-18, 20 depends on 19.

agents.name: Fix Code Review Residuals (R1-R4)
agents.system_prompt: You are a Next.js 14 full-stack developer working on the PRO LINE Gym Platform. Fix 4 code review residuals from Cycle 3: hardcoded i18n strings, locale ternaries, alert() calls, and zero UUID placeholders. All changes must be surgical — touch only the files specified. Use next-intl useTranslations() for all user-facing strings. Use sonner toast for all error handling. Follow existing patterns: getLocalizedName() for display names, try/catch + sonner for all Supabase operations.
agents.prompt:
Fix 4 code review residual issues in the PRO LINE Gym Platform at /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform

REFERENCE: docs/audit/cycle-4-prompts.md — PROMPT 16
REFERENCE: docs/audit/quality-gate-c3-code-review.md — Sections 2, 4, 7

FIX THESE 4 ISSUES:

### R1: Hardcoded placeholders in pt-client.tsx (HIGH)
- File: src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/pt/pt-client.tsx
- Line 361: Change placeholder="Name (EN)" to placeholder={t('name_en')} using useTranslations('pt')
- Line 369: Change placeholder="Name (FR)" to placeholder={t('name_fr')} using useTranslations('pt')
- Verify the 'pt' namespace has 'name_en' and 'name_fr' keys in all 3 locale files (en.json, ar.json, fr.json). Add them if missing.

### R2: Hardcoded role label ternary in coach/profile/page.tsx (HIGH)
- File: src/app/[locale]/coach/profile/page.tsx
- Line 97: Replace {isRTL ? 'مدرب' : locale === 'fr' ? 'Entraîneur' : 'Coach'} with i18n
- Check if this is a server or client component. If server: use getTranslations('coach') and t('role_label'). If client: use useTranslations('coach').
- Verify 'role_label' exists with proper translations in coach namespace in all 3 locale files. Add if missing.

### R3: alert() instead of sonner toast in rentals-client.tsx (MEDIUM)
- File: src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/rentals/rentals-client.tsx
- Line 124: Replace alert(firstIssue?.message || 'Validation error') with toast.error(firstIssue?.message || t('validation_error'))
- Line 136: Same — replace any remaining alert() with toast.error()
- Ensure import { toast } from 'sonner' is present
- Add try/catch around the Supabase insert (lines 140-153) if not already present

### R4: Zero UUID external_coach_id in rentals-client.tsx (MEDIUM)
- File: src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/rentals/rentals-client.tsx
- Line 115: Remove the hardcoded zero UUID — make external_coach_id nullable in the payload
- Line 143: Same — omit from actual Supabase insert or use null
- Check if the DB column allows NULL. If NOT NULL, fetch a real external coach or show a selector.
- Update the Zod schema if needed to make external_coach_id optional

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Use Server Components for data fetching, 'use client' only for interactive elements
- All text must use next-intl useTranslations() or getTranslations()
- All error handling must use sonner toast, never alert()
- Surgical changes only — touch only the 3 files specified
- After changes, verify: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20

Deliver: List of files changed and what was fixed in each.

agents.name: Fix Security Residuals (R5-R6)
agents.system_prompt: You are a Next.js 14 full-stack developer working on the PRO LINE Gym Platform. Fix 2 security residuals: add Zod validation to the coach attendance form, and create a migration to add gym scoping to pt_sessions and pt_assignments RLS policies. Follow existing patterns from 000011 and 000013 migration files. All changes must be surgical.
agents.prompt:
Fix 2 security residual issues in the PRO LINE Gym Platform at /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform

REFERENCE: docs/audit/cycle-4-prompts.md — PROMPT 17
REFERENCE: docs/audit/quality-gate-c3-security-review.md — Sections 1, 6

FIX THESE 2 ISSUES:

### R5: No Zod validation on attendance upsert (MEDIUM)
- Create file: src/lib/validators/attendance.schema.ts
- Define attendanceRecordSchema with:
  - class_schedule_id: z.string().uuid()
  - student_id: z.string().uuid()
  - status: z.enum(['present', 'absent', 'late', 'excused'])
  - date: z.string() (or z.coerce.date())
- Export from barrel: add 'export { attendanceRecordSchema } from './attendance.schema' to src/lib/validators/index.ts
- Wire into: src/app/[locale]/coach/attendance/page.tsx
  - Import attendanceRecordSchema from '@/lib/validators'
  - In handleSubmit (around line 222), add safeParse before the upsert call
  - On failure: toast.error(firstIssue?.message || 'Validation error')
  - On success: proceed with existing upsert

### R6: pt_sessions + pt_assignments RLS lacks gym scoping (MEDIUM)
- Create file: supabase/migrations/000014_fix_pt_rls_gym_scoping.sql
- Content: Follow pattern from 000013_fix_rental_bookings_rls.sql
- Drop existing pt_sessions_staff policy, recreate with gym scoping via pt_packages FK chain
- Drop existing pt_assignments_staff policy, recreate with gym scoping via pt_packages FK chain
- Both use: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM pt_packages WHERE pt_packages.id = [table].package_id AND pt_packages.gym_id = get_user_gym_id())

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Follow the existing migration numbering (000014)
- Use the exact RLS pattern from 000013
- Do not touch coach or student policies — only staff policies
- After changes, verify: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20

Deliver: List of files created/modified and what was fixed in each.

agents.name: Fix Database Residuals (R7-R10)
agents.system_prompt: You are a Next.js 14 full-stack developer working on the PRO LINE Gym Platform. Fix 4 database residuals: add gym scoping comment to pt_assignments query, regenerate Supabase types, add seed data, and parallelize queries with Promise.all. All changes must be surgical — touch only the files specified.
agents.prompt:
Fix 4 database residual issues in the PRO LINE Gym Platform at /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform

REFERENCE: docs/audit/cycle-4-prompts.md — PROMPT 18
REFERENCE: docs/audit/quality-gate-c3-database-review.md — Sections 2, 3, 4, 5

FIX THESE 4 ISSUES:

### R7: pt_assignments query unscoped (MEDIUM)
- File: src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/pt/page.tsx (around line 46-51)
- The pt_assignments query filters by package_id IN-list from already-gym-scoped packages
- This IS implicitly scoped, but needs documentation
- Add a comment above the query: "// Implicitly gym-scoped via package_id IN-filter — packages are filtered by gym_id above (line 30)"
- RLS (from migration 000014 if applied) provides server-side enforcement

### R8: pt_assignments missing from database.ts (MEDIUM)
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx supabase gen types typescript --local > src/types/database.ts
- If --local fails, try --linked
- Verify pt_assignments appears in the Tables section
- Run tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors

### R9: No pt_assignments seed data (LOW)
- File: supabase/migrations/000006_seed_data.sql
- Append at the end: 3-4 INSERT INTO pt_assignments records
- Use WHERE NOT EXISTS guards to avoid duplicates
- Reference existing students, pt_packages, coaches from seed data
- Create realistic scenarios (sessions_used < sessions_total)
- Example: SELECT existing IDs then INSERT with NOT EXISTS check

### R10: Sequential awaits in pt/page.tsx (LOW)
- File: src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/pt/page.tsx (around line 26)
- Convert 4 sequential awaits to:
  - Phase 1: Promise.all([packages, students, coaches]) — all independent
  - Phase 2: assignments query (depends on packages for package_id IN-filter)
- Follow pattern from belts/page.tsx which already uses Promise.all

IMPORTANT RULES:
- Surgical changes only — touch only the files specified
- After changes, verify: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20

Deliver: List of files changed and what was fixed in each.

agents.name: Full Build & Migration Verification
agents.system_prompt: You are a build/CI engineer working on the PRO LINE Gym Platform. Run the full verification pipeline: reset and reapply all migrations, verify the migration chain, run next build, and run tsc --noEmit. This is the integration gate — ensure all fixes from the 3 parallel agents compose correctly.
agents.prompt:
Run full build and migration verification for the PRO LINE Gym Platform at /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform

REFERENCE: docs/audit/cycle-4-prompts.md — PROMPT 19

RUN THESE VERIFICATION STEPS (in order, stop on first failure):

### Step 1: Verify migration chain
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && ls -1 supabase/migrations/ | sort
- Expected: 000001 through 000014, sequentially numbered, no gaps
- If any are missing, report which ones

### Step 2: Reset and reapply all migrations
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx supabase db reset
- This drops and recreates the local DB, applying all migrations 000001-000014
- Verify the output shows all 14 applied without errors
- If any migration fails, capture the error and stop

### Step 3: Regenerate types
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx supabase gen types typescript --local > src/types/database.ts
- If --local fails (no local Supabase), try --linked
- Verify pt_assignments is present in the generated file

### Step 4: TypeScript check
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1
- Must exit with code 0 and zero errors
- If errors, capture and report

### Step 5: Next.js build
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npx next build 2>&1
- Must exit with code 0
- Expected: '✓ Compiled successfully' or '✓ Generating static pages'
- If build fails, capture the error output

IMPORTANT: Run each step sequentially. Stop and report on first failure. If all pass, confirm 'BUILD VERIFICATION: ALL PASSED'.

Deliver: Output of each step and final pass/fail status.

agents.name: E2E Smoke Tests
agents.system_prompt: You are a QA engineer working on the PRO LINE Gym Platform. Create a smoke test checklist, start the dev server, and execute 9 manual smoke tests covering the most critical user journeys. This is the final quality gate before declaring Cycle 4 complete.
agents.prompt:
Create and execute E2E smoke tests for the PRO LINE Gym Platform at /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform

REFERENCE: docs/audit/cycle-4-prompts.md — PROMPT 20

TASKS:

### Task 1: Create smoke test checklist
- Create file: docs/testing/smoke-test-checklist.md
- Use the format from docs/testing/PHASE_C_TEST_REGISTER.md as a template
- Include these 9 test cases:
  1. Login as owner → verify dashboard loads
  2. Login as coach → verify coach portal loads
  3. Create a lead → verify appears in list
  4. Change lead status → verify persists
  5. Create a camp → verify appears (CRITICAL bug fix verification)
  6. Create a PT package → verify credit tracking shows
  7. Promote a student belt → verify stepper works
  8. Switch language to Arabic → verify no English strings
  9. Switch to French → verify no English strings

### Task 2: Start dev server
- Run: cd /Users/techstack/Desktop/Agentics/Projects/proline-gym-platform && npm run dev &
- Wait for server to be ready

### Task 3: Execute smoke tests
- For each test case, navigate the UI and verify the expected behavior
- Mark each test PASS or FAIL in the checklist
- For failures, document the exact error observed
- Pay SPECIAL attention to Test 5 (camp creation was CRITICALLY broken before)

IMPORTANT: This is MANUAL testing — create the checklist document, start the server, and verify each flow works. Document results in the checklist file.

Deliver: Completed smoke-test-checklist.md with all 9 test results.

instructions: 1. Read docs/audit/cycle-4-prompts.md for full context on all 5 prompts
2. Read docs/audit/session-audit-plan.md — check current Cycle 4 status
3. DISPATCH c4-code-residuals, c4-security-residuals, c4-db-residuals in PARALLEL (no shared files, no dependencies)
4. WAIT for all 3 parallel agents to complete with PASS status
5. DISPATCH c4-build-verify (depends on all 3 parallel agents)
6. WAIT for build verification to complete with PASS status
8. Collect all output files to output_dir
9. Update docs/audit/session-audit-plan.md: set status to CYCLE 4 COMPLETE
